prompt: Minimalist logo on pure black background. Horizontal composition, two elements side by side. LEFT ELEMENT: A yellow (#FAFA00) rectangular border/frame, portrait orientation (taller than wide). The frame has thick sharp yellow borders with solid black fill inside. Inside the frame, exactly TWO large white capital letter M characters placed side by side horizontally reading 'MM' — NOT stacked vertically, NOT four letters, just two M letters next to each other on ONE line. The MM text is bold condensed sans-serif (like Impact font), filling about 70% of the frame width. RIGHT ELEMENT: To the right of the yellow frame, the word 'AGENCY.' in the same bold condensed white sans-serif font. The period at the end is a small yellow (#FAFA00) square dot — this is a distinctive brand signature. The word AGENCY is vertically centered with the frame. CRITICAL: Only TWO letter Ms inside the frame, side by side on one line. The frame is rectangular with sharp 90-degree corners. No rounded corners. No shadows. No gradients. Clean flat vector graphic design. Ultra sharp edges, perfect geometry, professional quality.
negative_prompt: gradient, shadow, glow, neon, 3D, complex, busy, decorative, serif font, script font, thin lines, rounded corners, circle, realistic photo, photography, human, blur, low quality, pixelated, extra text, grunge, noise, texture, multiple fonts, four Ms, stacked text inside frame, three lines of text, lowercase, drop shadow, emboss, bevel, rounded frame corners, compression artifacts, blurry edges, rough edges
